en.name: ShiXiaoEr Organic Yellow Millet 2.5kg
en.shortDescription: Premium organic millet from Suihua, Heilongjiang — rich in nutrients, easy to digest.
en.description: ShiXiaoEr Organic Yellow Millet is grown in the organic black soil region of Suihua, Heilongjiang — one harvest per year with 180 days of slow growth. Each grain is golden yellow, plump, and aromatic. When cooked, it releases a thick layer of millet oil (rice cream), creating a smooth, nutrient-rich porridge. Certified organic with no pesticides or chemical fertilizers. Naturally rich in dietary fiber, B vitamins, and minerals. Excellent for baby food, convalescent diets, and everyday healthy meals. Vacuum-sealed for freshness.
